'''pajolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycotoxicology|mycotoxicology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycotoxicology|mycotoxicology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pajolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæjeleth|pæjeleth]] || [[word:pæjelej|pæjelej]] || [[word:pæjelesh|pæjelesh]] || [[word:pæjele|pæjele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pajojoloth|pajojoloth]] || [[word:pajojoloj|pajojoloj]] || [[word:pajojolosh|pajojolosh]] || [[word:pajojolo|pajojolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pajoloth|pajoloth]] || [[word:pajoloj|pajoloj]] || [[word:pajolosh|pajolosh]] || [[word:pajolo|pajolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pajoflofth|pajoflofth]] || [[word:pajoflofj|pajoflofj]] || [[word:pajoflofsh|pajoflofsh]] || [[word:pajoflof|pajoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pajolotho|pajolotho]] || [[word:pajolojo|pajolojo]] || [[word:pajolosho|pajolosho]] || [[word:pajoloko|pajoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pajoloth|pajoloth]] || [[word:pajoloj|pajoloj]] || [[word:pajolosh|pajolosh]] || [[word:pajolo|pajolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pajolothol|pajolothol]] || [[word:pajolojol|pajolojol]] || [[word:pajoloshol|pajoloshol]] || [[word:pajolokol|pajolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pajoloothotho|pajoloothotho]] || [[word:pajoloojojo|pajoloojojo]] || [[word:pajolooshosho|pajolooshosho]] || [[word:pajolooko|pajolooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pajolothon|pajolothon]] || [[word:pajolojon|pajolojon]] || [[word:pajoloshon|pajoloshon]] || [[word:pajolokon|pajolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pajolothooro|pajolothooro]] || [[word:pajolojooro|pajolojooro]] || [[word:pajoloshooro|pajoloshooro]] || [[word:pajolokooro|pajolokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
